title: Orkney Transmission Link project: contingent liability
body: "Details of a proposal by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) to undertake a bespoke, time-limited, capped contingent liability in respect of a policy indemnity to Scottish and Southern Electricity Networks Transmission (SSENT) for the Orkney Transmission Link project.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
